name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = 0
        /\ flag = <<>>


Next == /\ num' = num + 1
        /\ flag' = Append(flag, num)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

(* TypeOK: q is a sequence of length <= K, head and tail are integers in [0..K] *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(0..K)
  /\ head \in 0..K
  /\ tail \in 0..K

(* Init: queue is empty, head and tail at 0 *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0

(* Next: either producer or consumer action *)
Next == 
  (* Producer action: if queue not full, add element *)
  \/ /\ Len(q) < K
     /\ q' = Append(q, 0)  (* placeholder element *)
     /\ head' = head
     /\ tail' = tail
  \/ (* Consumer action: if queue not empty, remove element *)
     /\ Len(q) > 0
     /\ q' = Tail(q)
     /\ head' = head
     /\ tail' = tail

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS ServerIds

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



(* --type invariants
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
        /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup ServerIds
        /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}
*)

(* --initialization
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
      /\ votedFor = None
      /\ state = Follower
*)

(* --next-state relation
Next == \/ (state = Follower /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor
           /\ state' = state)
      \/ (state = Candidate /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
           /\ votedFor' = None
           /\ state' = Candidate)
      \/ (state = Leader /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor
           /\ state' = Leader)
*)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers :
              /\ r \in readers
              /\ readers' = Remove(r, readers)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in Readers :
                  /\ r \notin readers
                  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in Readers :
                  /\ r \in readers
                  /\ readers' = Remove(r, readers)
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]
        \/ /\ token' = token
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]
        \/ /\ token' = token
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLE store

Init == /\ \A k \in Keys: store[k] = 0

Next == /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
            /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        \/ \E k \in Keys:
            /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (Avg - clocks[i])]
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon
        /\ \A j \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks[j] \in Nat
          /\ offsets[j] \in Nat
        /\ epsilon' \in Nat

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets, epsilon>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}
        /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = 0

Next == \/ /\ turn = 0
          /\ wants = 0
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = 1
        \/ /\ turn = 1
          /\ wants = 0
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = 1
        \/ /\ turn = 0
          /\ wants = 1
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = 1
        \/ /\ turn = 1
          /\ wants = 1
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Nat -> Nat]
        /\ \A n \in Nat : counts[n] = 0

Next == /\ \A n \in Nat : counts[n] = counts[n]
        /\ \E n \in Nat : counts[n] = counts[n] + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
